commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And one shall say unto him, What are these wounds in your hands. Then he shall answer, Those with which I was wounded in the house of my friends. My parents marked me thus, ver. (Calmet) Some have understood this of Jesus Christ. (Rupert) (St. Thomas Aquinas) But the context excludes this interpretation, which would be injurious to him. (Calmet) The false prophet is reformed by his parents' correction, so that he applies to agriculture, and owns that he had been justly punished. Jerome) (Haydock).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
